task:
Build this app in Clear:

**CRM-to-Email Sync** (Level 7)

ARCHETYPE: data_sync. Shape: backend-only (no pages, no auth), CRON schedule (every 1 hour), FETCH from an external HTTPS URL, transform each record, SAVE to a destination table. This is distinct from batch_job (no external fetch) and from etl_pipeline (data_sync implies sourceвҶ’destination with 2+ external systems or an obvious source-of-truth relationship вҖ” here 'CRM users' вҶ’ 'mailing list'). DO NOT build a dashboard. DO NOT add auth. D
final_source:
/*
CRM-to-Email Sync (Level 7)

DATAFLOW:
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ Scheduled Task (every 1 hour)            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Fetch from JSONPlaceholder API      в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Transform users to mailing list     в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Save to MailingList table           в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
         в”Ӯ
         в””в”Җв”Җ> GET /api/mailing-list (verify endpoint)
*/

build for javascript backend
database is local memory

create a MailingList table:
  name, required
  email, required
  tag, default 'imported'
  synced_at_date, auto

# Scheduled sync вҖ” fetch from CRM every 1 hour
background 'sync-crm-to-mailing-list':
  runs every 1 hour

  # Fetch users from JSONPlaceholder (mock CRM)
  users = call api 'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users'
  
  # Transform each user and save to MailingList
  for each user in users:
    mailing_record = { }
    mailing_record's name is user's name
    mailing_record's email is user's email
    mailing_record's tag is 'imported'
    save mailing_record to MailingList

# API endpoint for verification
when user calls GET /api/mailing-list:
  contacts = get all MailingList
  send back contacts
